abstract: The location of the media item on disk.
overview:
## Discussion

If the location of the media item isn’t available, this property returns [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibMediaItemLocationType/unknown].

This method returns URLs that are outside of the default sandbox. To use the iTunesLibrary framework, a sandboxed app must have the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/BundleResources/Entitlements/com.apple.security.assets.music.read-write] or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/BundleResources/Entitlements/com.apple.security.assets.music.read-only] entitlement.

To access the media item file in a sandboxed app, call [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSURL/startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()].

Listing 1.

For more information about using URLs that are outside the default sandbox from a sandboxed app, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/Security/Conceptual/AppSandboxDesignGuide/AppSandboxInDepth/AppSandboxInDepth.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40011183-CH3-SW16].

In nonsandboxed apps, you can use the returned location URL to access the media item file directly.

items.description: The title of the media item.
items.name: title

items.description: The title of the media item to use when sorting.
items.name: sortTitle

items.description: Information about the artist that iTunes associates with the media item.
items.name: artist

items.description: The name of the composer that iTunes associates with the media item.
items.name: composer

items.description: The name to use when sorting by composer.
items.name: sortComposer

items.description: The rating of the media item.
items.name: rating

items.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether iTunes computes the media item’s rating from its album rating.
items.name: isRatingComputed

items.description: If nonzero, the actual time playback of the media item starts instead of 0:00 (in milliseconds).
items.name: startTime

items.description: If nonzero, the actual time playback of the media item stops versus the total time (in milliseconds).
items.name: stopTime

items.description: The album of the media item.
items.name: album

items.description: The genre of the media item, if any.
items.name: genre

items.description: The kind of media item file, such as an MPEG audio file.
items.name: kind

items.description: The length of the media item in milliseconds.
items.name: totalTime

items.description: The position of the media item within its album.
items.name: trackNumber

title: location
